title: SensitivityToEquity
description: Represents risk sensitivity calculated with respect to the value of an individual equity instrument.

sensitivityToIndices.description: Represents risk sensitivity calculated with respect to the level of an equity or market index.

sensitivityToFunds.description: Represents risk sensitivity calculated with respect to the value of a fund, such as a mutual fund or collective investment vehicle.

sensitivityToETFs.description: Represents risk sensitivity calculated with respect to the value of an exchange-traded fund (ETF).
